title: Extend _validate_run_state() with life_max + faction_rep_delta type checks
description: SPECIALIST-9 CHK-2: _validate_run_state() currently only checks biome (String), card_index (numeric), life_essence (numeric), anam_accumulated (now added P23). Missing: (1) life_max should be numeric >= 1. (2) faction_rep_delta should be Dictionary with all 5 faction keys. (3) cards_played should be numeric >= 0. Add typeof checks for life_max + cards_played. Add dict-has-key checks for faction_rep_delta (same pattern as _validate() faction loop). Keep _validate_run_state() < 50 lines.
notes: SPEC-2: Extended _validate_run_state() — added life_max (numeric >=1), cards_played (numeric >=0), faction_rep_delta (dict with all 5 factions). Function grows from 15 to 34 lines (< 50 limit). Validates SAVE-RUNSTATE-VALIDATE-EXTEND task description exactly.
